hooks.rewakeMessage: A new project file was just created in telabotpower.
hooks.command: $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = if ($d.tool_input -and $d.tool_input.file_path) { $d.tool_input.file_path } else { '' }; if ($f -match 'telabotpower' -and $f -match '(page\.tsx|route\.ts|schema\.prisma|\\lib\\[^\\]+\.ts|\\components\\[^\\]+\.tsx)$') { Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"New project file created - please update docs/graphify.md to reflect the change."}'; exit 2 }
